rulings.Case Title: RITA RABINOVICH VS. COUNTRIWIDE HOME LOANS INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 15, 2010, line 2. DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC, COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., RECONTRUST COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Off calendar as moot in view of the court's ruling on demurrer.

rulings.Case Title: RITA RABINOVICH VS. COUNTRIWIDE HOME LOANS INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 15, 2010, line 2. DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC, COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., RECONTRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained without leave to amend, no reasonable probability that defects can be cured by amendment. The 1st cause of action (quiet title) fails because MERS and Recontrust did have authority to foreclose. To the extent this dispute over title is based on the wrongful foreclosure claim, plaintiff fails to allege tender. The 2nd cause of action (wrongful foreclosure) does not exist and tender is not sufficiently pled. The 3rd cause of action (fraudulent misrepresentation) lacks a legally recognized duty and justifiable reliance. Plaintiff does not sufficiently allege how the selling of the loan harmed her, how she relied on that, or why defendants had a duty to disclose. Generally, there is no duty between a bank and a borrower. The 4th cause of action (implied covenant) fails because an implied covenant cannot impose substantive duties beyond those incorporated into the terms of the parties' contract. The 5th cause of action (B&P Code 17200) is predicated on conduct that is not actionable. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: PORFERIO EBORLAS VS. INDYMAC BANK, FSB et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 15, 2010, line 7. DEFENDANTS ONEWEST BANK, FSB, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overruled as to 12th and 15th causes of action. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to 2nd and 10th causes of action; no reasonable probability that defects can be cured by amendment. Neither moving defendants were the originating lender or broker, or had any role in the origination. O W did not assume the liabilities of I M B per its agreement with the F D I C. Non-judicial foreclosure under a deed of trust does not qualify as a collection of debt governed by the Rosenthal Act. Sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the following: 3rd, 6th and 7th causes of action to plead when alleged fraud was made and/or discovered, which defendants made representations or concealed information, and whether that person had the authority to speak on behalf of the corporate defendants. As to the 4th cause of action plaintiff must distinguish conduct of the individual defendants. In the 5th cause of action plaintiff must plead facts showing a promise that would support estoppel. For the 8th cause of action plaintiff must plead facts showing what benefit was conferred on defendants. As to the 9th cause of action plaintiff has stated a claim for quiet title as to I M B but not to the other defendants. Plaintiff must plead what adverse claims are made to title as to all defendants. The 11th and 13th causes of action must be pled with particularity. The 14th cause of action must state facts showing the mortgage was a type subject to the translation requirement. =(302/CWW)
